videos.title: This deck breaks Leyline of Hope.
videos.description:
Magic: The Gathering Arena deck tech & gameplay with a monowhite lifegain aggro deck, featuring Leyline of Hope, Ajani's Pridemate and Linden, the Steadfast Queen from Foundations in Standard.
